title: REPLUG: Retrieval-Augmented Black-Box Language Models

defines.name: REPLUG
defines.definition: A retrieval-augmented language modeling framework that augments a frozen black-box language model by prepending retrieved documents and optionally ensembles multiple retrieved contexts in parallel.

defines.name: REPLUG LSR
defines.definition: A training scheme that uses a black-box language model’s scores to supervise and improve the retriever.

problem: Prior retrieval-augmented language models require access to internal language model representations or fine-tuning, making them difficult to apply to large API-based black-box models.
